You 3/17/2026 1:54 PM • Good morning Anand!

I may need your help to unblock something here. I just caught up with my team and it seems that the laptops for myself and the US-based resources still have not been issued or ordered on Cisco's end. The asset management team had previously told us we would be receiving the hardware this week, but yesterday my team learned that the equipment had not yet been ordered.

We're now past the two-month mark since this engagement kicked off, and the hardware gap is the only thing standing between us and getting real work started. The challenge on my end is that every time I set an expected start date based on what the Cisco team communicates, that date ends up moving, which puts me in a tough spot.

I want to make sure we get past this and get moving ASAP. Two things that would help:

1. If you're able to help move things along with asset management so we can get a confirmed order and a delivery date we can plan against, that alone would solve it.

2. Alternatively, if Cisco is able to provide a Mac OS image that meets your requirements, I can procure the hardware on our side and have it ready by tomorrow. I'd just need the image file and I'll handle imaging on our end.

Happy to jump on a call if it's easier to sort this out live!

We're really eager to get started and the team is ready to hit the ground running as soon as the hardware piece is resolved. Happy to do whatever it takes on our end to make that happen. Let me know what makes sense and we'll move on it immediately 🙂
